chinese_news.title: 鸿蒙智行全面引入电池二供，国轩高科将上车问界｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
今年以来，市场竞争进一步加剧，内存等供应链成本大幅攀升，寻求供应链降本、使产品定价更具竞争力，成了汽车行业更为迫切的课题。

在这样的背景下，36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，稳居中高端市场的鸿蒙智行也开始全面引入多家动力电池供应商。

“除了尊界短期内规模支撑不了第二家，其他界可能都会引入多元电池供应商。”有知情人士透露。

据36氪了解，其中，长期由宁德时代独供的问界品牌，将引入中创新航、国轩高科两家二线电池供应商，问界M6现已定点了国轩高科的81度电池包，有知情人士透露，去年国轩高科便已收到了鸿蒙智行的定点信，中创新航也将进入问界的供应体系。

而就在2022年8月，赛力斯曾与宁德时代签署了五年长期战略合作协议，双方宣布问界车型，全面搭载宁德时代动力电池。去年6月，宁德时代在问界超级工厂内的产线投产，这是宁德时代首次落地“厂中厂”模式，也是它在重庆的第一条电池产线。宁德时代与问界合作程度之紧密，可见一斑。

36氪还了解到，智界品牌的动力电池，原本由宁德时代与中创新航供应，现即将引入国轩高科与欣旺达

chinese_news.title: 乘新浪潮之势，建智造创新之城，2026年番禺产业高质量发展招商大会圆满举行
chinese_news.summary:
潮起湾区新机遇，科创赋能新番禺。6月16日上午，2026年番禺产业高质量发展招商大会在广州番禺良仓新造创意园举行，大会以“新浪潮·新番禺”为主题，旨在搭建高效政企对接、企企交流、资本赋能平台。

大会由广州市番禺信息技术投资发展有限公司（下称“番禺信投”）、广州市番禺交通建设投资集团有限公司（下称“番禺交投”）、广州市番禺区新造镇房地产开发公司主办（下称“新造房地产公司”），中国农业银行股份有限公司广州华南支行协办（下称“农行广州华南支行”），36氪承办，汇聚行业智库、龙头企业、优质项目、头部投资机构等多方代表逾百人，以科创为媒、以产业为桥、以资本为翼，共商发展大计，共绘产业新篇。

与此同时，为深度整合政企、金融、媒体、产业、属地资源，充分发挥各方核心优势，聚力区域产业发展、招商引资、品牌宣传、资源互通对接等工作，推动番禺区新造镇及全域产业高质量发展，番禺信投、番禺交投、新造房地产公司、农行广州华南支行与36氪签约成立番禺未来产业创新联盟。番禺未来产业创新联盟将整合属地政府、国有平台、金融机构、产业媒体四大核心资源，聚焦招商引资、品牌宣传、产业对

chinese_news.title: 融了数亿美金的「大晓机器人」，其创始人揭开了具身行业的割裂一面
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨

编辑｜张雨忻

梳理近半年的成果，大晓机器人董事长、商汤科技联合创始人王晓刚，滔滔不绝聊了10多分钟。

成立于2025年7月，大晓机器人（ACE ROBOTICS）是具身领域姗姗来迟的入局者。但一年来，这位新玩家成了赛道的“卷王”：

在模型侧，大晓新发布的具身大脑——世界模型“开悟（Kairos）3.0”，在4项全球具身智能基准测试中取得SOTA；开源的Kairos 3.0-4B，则率先实现在端侧直接驱动具身智能本体的能力。

chinese_news.title: 在大疆、影石夹缝中做智能影像生意，这家公司连续五年每年增长50%｜硬氪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 黄楠

编辑 | 袁斯来

在创业者中，OBSBOT寻影CEO刘博已经是个“老人”了。

2016年，刘博浙大毕业就到深圳创业。不管是当初还是现在，在高调的“天才少年”创业者中，刘博履历都算不上特别耀眼。

他没有太多感性的故事分享。唯一一段难忘的经历，就是2019年时，因为产品定义出问题滞销，公司账户钱只够几个月，裁掉砍掉一半，相关业务暂停。那是他印象中最安静的一个冬天。

转机出现在2020年。居家办公常态化下，会议常用的Webcam需求暴增。刘博发现，市面上常见的摄像头都是固定式，而人在家里不会一直正襟危坐——会动、会起身、会改变姿势。他决定做一款能智能跟踪、自动构图的Webcam产品。2020年，寻影发布Tiny系列摄像头。

这一款产品救活了公司。此后几年，寻影在高端Webcam市占率超过50%，位居Top 1。寻影也先后拿到了数亿美元融资，投资方包括滴滴出行、红杉中国、光远资本、招银国际、HKX基金、Briz

针对多发食品安全问题，市场监管总局约谈山姆总部

记者15日了解到，针对一段时期以来监管发现和媒体曝光的山姆线下门店及线上网店多发的食品安全问题，近日，市场监管总局依法对沃尔玛（中国）投资有限公司（即山姆总部）负责人进行了责任约谈，要求其严格按照《中华人民共和国食品安全法》，以及《食品销售连锁企业落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》《网络食品销售经营者落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》等法律法规规定开展食品经营活动，始终树牢食品安全意识，严格落实食品安全主体责任，自觉践行企业社会责任，严防全链条食品安全风险，切实保障公众饮食安全。

chinese_news.title: Pocket 4P双摄来了：手机影像之外，大疆正在重做一台“口袋电影机”
chinese_news.summary:
在手机影像能力不断逼近专业设备的今天，一个问题变得越来越尖锐：独立影像设备，还有存在的必要吗？

6月15日，大疆正式发布 Osmo Pocket 4P，将这台口袋云台相机推向更专业的创作场景。作为 Pocket 系列的新一代旗舰产品，Pocket 4P 定位为“装进口袋里的电影机”，搭载双摄系统、17级动态范围与 D-Log 2 专业色彩曲线，试图在口袋级设备中进一步容纳专业影像能力。

Pocket 4P 以 3799元起售，多平台预订量持续走高。

对于一个原本被视为“手机影像补充”的品类来说，这种热度本身就提出了一个新的问题：当手机已经足够强，为什么仍然有越来越多人愿意为一台独立影像设备买单？

过去几年，旗舰手机几乎每一次更新都在吞噬传统相机的边界。从多摄系统、长焦镜头、计算摄影，到 Log 视频、AI 修图和一键出片，手机已经成为绝大多数普通用户最顺手的影像工具。

但另一边，一个看起来有些反常识的品类，却在井喷增长。

在丽江玉龙雪山的拍摄现场，拿着大疆 Poc

chinese_news.title: 从一个想法到一个产品，年轻开发者把生活观察写进代码
chinese_news.summary:
6月14日，HarmonyOS创新赛·极客赛道决赛在HDC华为开发者大会（HDC 2026）落下帷幕。 

此前，20支入围队伍从众多参赛作品中脱颖而出，在36小时极限编码中抢先使用HarmonyOS 7，围绕AI、3D空间化、用户体验等方向展开比拼。随着最终获奖名单揭晓，比赛的结果已经落定，但比奖项本身更值得被看见的，是这些作品背后一批年轻开发者正在关注什么，又试图用代码回答什么。

翻开参赛作品的名单，我们意外地发现，这其中很多的开发者都还是在校学生，没有成熟公司的资源，没有完整的商业团队，甚至可能没有充足的开发经验。但在这场比赛里，他们把自己的生活观察、专业背景和兴趣经验变成了一个个可运行的产品。

这些作品构成了这场创新赛值得被观察的一面：年轻开发者不再只是追逐抽象的技术命题，而是在用代码回应自己的生活。

这群年轻人是如何在生活中发现问题并用代码编写出解决方案的？一群还在校园里的年轻人，又是如何在

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: US-Iran peace deal triggered flight-to-safety unwind; BTC dipped to $66K but oil/geopolitical premium collapsing creates asymmetric upside into summer.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78'; BlackRock bitcoin income fund launch signals institutional accumulation window.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX's valuation exceed $2 trillion by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX just briefly topped Microsoft; Elon stated ~$1T revenue target for 2030, implying current trajectory supports $2T+ valuation within 18–24 months if revenue ramp accelerates.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'SpaceX rises 12% to leapfrog Amazon, briefly top Microsoft in market cap'; Hacker News discussion of SpaceX-Cursor $60B acquisition signal validates AI compute monetization thesis.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum complete Shanghai 2 protocol upgrade by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports protocol overhaul 'moves into final development stage'—this is the clearest signal of imminent mainnet readiness; upgrade success unlocks staking efficiency and institutional demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Ethereum's biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage'; State Street stablecoin reserves fund launch signals institutional appetite for ETH-backed infrastructure.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Binance secure EU license without forced operational restrictions by 2026-08-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Binance claims compliance despite Greek rejection reports; liquidity hit and withdrawal caps would trigger $500M+ stablecoin flight; resolution by end-Q3 2026 is binary and high-impact.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection'; warning that rejection would 'weaken liquidity' is explicit hedging language.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will General Motors stock outperform S&P 500 through 2026-11-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: GM's new Lockheed Martin defense partnership enters active weapons production cycle; aerospace/defense spending accelerating post-Iran deal; auto sector valuation recovery window opening.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'General Motors announces new defense partnership with Lockheed Martin as the country ramps up its production of weapons'; defense capex is multi-year tailwind.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin-denominated derivatives trading volume exceed $500B daily on US-regulated platforms by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CFTC Commitment of Traders + CME, CBOE, Cboe Volatility Index public reporting
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph signals 'US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading'; BlackRock/State Street entrance validates institutional derivatives demand; market currently underestimates retail FOMO into regulated leverage.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Coinbase tokenized stocks launch (June 2026) will create precedent for spot-perp arbitrage; first $100B daily vol milestone likely priced in at <40% odds currently.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin settlement volume exceed $1 billion monthly in Africa by 2027-03-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ripple quarterly reports + Flutterwave transaction disclosures + XRPL ledger block explorer (public)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph: 'Ripple targets Africa's booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment'; African remittance corridor is $50B+ annually; blockchain adoption curve is exponential but market treats as speculative.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr reports Chinese firms (e.g., Huawei HarmonyOS ecosystem) exploring similar Africa-Asia payment rails; first-mover advantage in remittance rails undervalued vs. fintech comps.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Snap's new AR glasses (Spectacles) ship units >500k by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Snap earnings reports + IDC AR/VR shipment tracker + press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC: 'Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future'; $2,195 price point targets prosumer/creator segment; Apple Vision Pro comparison creates narrative asymmetry (underestimation of niche profitability).
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: DJI Osmo Pocket 4P dual-camera launch (per 36Kr) signals content-creator hardware cycle heating; Snap's glasses target same demographic; 500k units is achievable if margins >40%.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's ETH/BTC ratio exceed 0.05 by 2026-10-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Binance ETH/BTC spot price, settlement via Polymarket oracle
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Protocol overhaul (Shanghai 2) + stablecoin reserve boom (State Street fund) creates ETH-positive momentum; BTC dominance cycle exhausting; ratio at ~0.048 currently, 0.05 breakout is likely but treated as 50/50.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Institutional money market fund launches (State Street GENIUS Act fund) signal shift from BTC reserve accumulation to ETH yield infrastructure; Shanghai 2 upgrade reduces supply-side friction.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US oil prices (WTI) stay below $75/bbl through 2026-08-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report + CME WTI futures settlement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC Iran deal + BBC reports show 'fragile quiet in Lebanon'; US-Iran détente removes war premium; oil fell below $78 this week but market is overestimating geopolitical risk rebound into summer.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: China's 36Kr reports industrial demand weakness (supply chain cost compression language); global growth skepticism underprices sustained low oil; $75 floor is 65% likely but trading at 45%.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD outright; geopolitical premium collapse (Iran deal) is overdone and will reverse into Q3 as institutions rotate into spot and derivative accumulation windows.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum'—price action shows capitulation by HODLRs into relief rally; BlackRock bitcoin income fund = new bid.
CoinDesk: 'BlackRock's new bitcoin income fund offers cash flow alongside BTC exposure'—regulatory approval indicates institutional wallet readiness.
CNBC: SpaceX $1T revenue target implies crypto/blockchain monetization accelerating; AI compute commodity futures rival commodity markets in size.
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical risk is not eliminated—Russian warship incident in English Channel (BBC) + Lebanon fragility + Venezuela power grid rebuild signal continued volatility; macro tightening from Fed could resume if inflation reopens.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or BTC June 2026 call spread ($70K/$75K); hedge with short oil (WTI) or long DXY (dollar strength) to capture geopolitical mean reversion.

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH relative to BTC (buy ETH/BTC ratio); protocol overhaul into final stage + stablecoin reserve fund launches create systematic institutional demand skew toward Ethereum infrastructure.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Ethereum's biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage'—Shanghai 2 delivery is 95%+ likely by Q3 2026.
State Street + Cointelegraph: Stablecoin reserve money market fund launch signals shift from BTC custodial accumulation to ETH yield; $100B+ AUM target = 5–10x ETH ecosystem demand.
Coinbase tokenized stock launch (June 2026) creates on-chain settlement layer demand spike favoring Ethereum.
investment_theses.counter_view: Shanghai 2 could disappoint (complexity/bugs); BTC spot-ETF inflows could outpace ETH demand; macro recession risk reduces yield-chasing behavior among institutions.
investment_theses.expression: Buy ETH/BTC on Binance or perpetual swap (target 0.050 from 0.048); or long ETH call spreads ($4,500/$5,000) vs. short BTC calls to capture ratio expansion.

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVDA and semiconductor growth exposure (MU, TSM); AI compute commodity futures market emergence + HarmonyOS/DJI China ecosystem scaling + US defense spending ramp (GM-Lockheed partnership) create sustained capex demand.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity'—AI compute futures rival commodity markets in size; NVDA benefits from infrastructure margin expansion.
36Kr: HarmonyOS ecosystem (Huawei, DJI, others) adopting advanced imaging/AI (Osmo Pocket 4P dual-camera, HDC 2026 developer wins) signals non-US AI chip demand acceleration.
CNBC: GM-Lockheed Martin defense partnership = multi-year capex cycle; defense semiconductor content per unit rising.
investment_theses.counter_view: Chip oversupply risk from TSMC, Samsung capacity additions; China's indigenous chip ecosystem (HiSilicon HiSilicon Kirin revival) could cannibalize NVDA serviceable addressable market; macro growth slowdown reduces AI datacenter investment.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA or Semiconductor Select Sector ETF (XLK); hedge with short Chinese tech (KWEB, TSM puts) to express US chip dominance thesis.

investment_theses.thesis: Short CAD/Long USD (or equivalently, short commodities/long DXY); oil's post-Iran deal collapse to sub-$78 is the start of a multi-month commodity down-cycle as geopolitical risk premium unwinds and China demand stays soft.
supporting_signals: BBC: US-Iran peace deal concluded; Cointelegraph: 'oil drops under $78'; CNBC Iran deal 'meeting lukewarm reactions' suggests limited escalation risk removal over next 6 months.
36Kr: Chinese supply chain cost compression language + Rivian layoffs signal industrial capex caution; global growth skepticism = sustained low oil/commodities.
DXY likely strengthens as risk-off capital seeks safe haven; post-deal relief rally exhausts quickly.
investment_theses.counter_view: Surprise Middle East escalation (Hezbollah, Russian warship near NATO waters) could re-trigger risk-on commodity bid; OPEC+ supply cuts could support oil floor; China stimulus could reignite demand.
investment_theses.expression: Short crude oil (WTI) June futures or buy $70 puts; long USD Index (DXY) spot or June calls; short commodities ETF (DBC) as hedge to long equities.

investment_theses.thesis: Long SpaceX-adjacent crypto tokens (SOL, PENGU, HYPE) as proxy for commercial space/AI compute monetization narrative; Hacker News $60B Cursor acquisition signal + SpaceX $1T revenue target validate venture-scale AI infrastructure bet.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: 'SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B' (score 459) = high-engagement signal that SpaceX-AI compute synergy is top-of-mind for tech elite; validates Elon's $1T revenue narrative.
CNBC: SpaceX valuation just exceeded Microsoft briefly; institutional momentum is real and under-priced in crypto comps.
CoinDesk: Y Combinator AI agent that 'can build and run entire business from text' = on-chain settlement infrastructure demand spike (SOL, UNI likely beneficiaries).
investment_theses.counter_view: Cursor acquisition is unconfirmed rumor; SpaceX-crypto synergy is hype-driven and execution-dependent; regulatory risk (SEC scrutiny of tokenized SpaceX products) could crater sentiment.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL spot or SOL perpetuals (June target $180+ from $160); or PENGU (Pudgy Penguins, community narrative play); avoid leverage >3x due to volatility.
